text: AIDS 2026, the 26th International AIDS Conference AIDS 2026 will take place in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, and virtually on 26-31 July 2026. We convene, educate and advocate for a world in which HIV no longer presents a threat to public health and individual well-being.
